commit.message:
Show D-pad only on touch-capable devices (#27)

* Show D-pad only on touch-capable devices

Introduces TouchDeviceDetector.js (isTouchDevice) which checks
navigator.maxTouchPoints; UIScene calls dpad.setVisible(isTouchDevice())
after creating the DPad so keyboard/mouse users see a clean interface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Re-evaluate D-pad visibility on resize

Handles DevTools device toolbar toggling and detachable touchscreens
that change touch capability after initial load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix D-pad shown on Windows laptops with precision touchpads

Adds pointer: coarse media query check alongside maxTouchPoints so that
Windows laptops (which report maxTouchPoints > 0 for touchpads) are not
incorrectly treated as touch devices. Only devices with both touch points
and a coarse pointer (i.e. a real touchscreen) show the D-pad.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add CTXFLOW_WORKER env var, fix stop for multi-terminal, add --verbose to demo

  (git config is per-repo, shared across terminals)

  in real time

commit.message:
Add GadgetDatabase: lean VCG store separate from full results

GadgetDatabase stores only the 6 fields needed by HybridQAOA:
  constraints, n_layers, angle_strategy, outcomes, Hamiltonian, opt_angles

collect_vcg_data gains gadget_db_path=None; when provided it loads,
adds (with deduplication), and saves the GadgetDatabase automatically.

All 6 run scripts gain --gadget_db (default ./gadgets/gadget_db.pkl)
threaded through run_vcg and run_hybrid so that:
  - VCG training builds both the full results pkl and the gadget database
  - HybridQAOA uses gadget_db_path pointing at the lean database

Update README Core API and Quick Start sections accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Harden foundation: auth, parallel fetching, shared utils, stable intervals

- Add authenticateRoute() to /api/google-calendar (was the only
  unprotected API route)
- Extract duplicated date utils (getCurrentMonday, getDisplayMonday,
  getWeekRange, etc.) to lib/date-utils.ts — shared by workspace
  and calendar contexts
- Parallelize data fetching on project switch with Promise.all
  instead of sequential calls (clients, groups, statuses, members, etc.)
- Stabilize calendar sync intervals using ref pattern so interval
  effects don't reset when syncCalendarEvents callback changes
- Document all required env vars in .env.local.example

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: add donation section with QR code placeholders

☕ Add Buy Me a Coffee Section

New Features:

1. Added donation section to README.md
   - "Buy Me a Coffee" section
   - QR code placeholders for WeChat Pay and Alipay
   - Clean table layout

2. Added donation section to README_CN.md
   - "请喝咖啡" section (Chinese)
   - QR code placeholders for 微信支付 and 支付宝
   - Clean table layout

3. Created images directory
   - Added README.md with instructions
   - Prepared for QR code images

Image Setup:

To add your QR codes:
1. Rename your images to:
   - wechat-pay.jpg (WeChat Pay)
   - alipay.jpg (Alipay)

2. Copy to images directory:
   cp /path/to/wechat.jpg images/wechat-pay.jpg
   cp /path/to/alipay.jpg images/alipay.jpg

3. Commit and push:
   git add images/
   git commit -m "docs: add donation QR codes"
   git push

Layout:
- Side-by-side QR codes
- 200px width for each image
- Centered alignment
- Clear labels

docs: Wave 1 findings + R1.5 rung + attribution contract (#544)

Log Wave 1 investigation results (B, E, F, G, H, I) in diagnostic
report with hypothesis status summary and R² decomposition. H7
(weight instability) identified as primary cause of suit regression.

Add formal R1.5 rung for partner-semantics enrichment with suit-aware
features (partner_level_same_suit, partner_level_same_color_offsuit,
partner_level_off_color). R1.5 isolates partner-context gains before
R2 adds opponent context.

Add §7.5 Feature-Effect Attribution Contract to arc_d_execution_plan
as a ladder-wide requirement: every rung must produce deployment-facing
evidence (counterfactual, ablation delta, slice analysis, decision-shift
audit), not just training R².

Update all plan files (r1_master_plan, r1_training_plan, r1_follow_ups,
r2_follow_ups) with R1→R1.5→R2 sequencing and feature-effect testing
requirements.

feat(swe-bench): add dynamic learning refresh for parallel workers (#1407)

Parallel workers now refresh learnings every 5 instances, combining
disk learnings from prior runs with current session learnings from
other workers. This enables inter-worker learning propagation during
parallel benchmark runs.

Add SessionMemory.getCurrentSessionLearnings() public accessor for
reading in-progress session data without ending the session.

commit.message:
Fix/t260 framing audio toggle (#186)

* Fix framing audio toggle ignored (T260)

Pass include_audio parameter through to Modal GPU functions so the
framing export respects the audio toggle. The parameter existed in
call_modal_framing_ai() but was never forwarded to remote_gen() calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add local YOLO fallback for player detection when Modal disabled

Project-based detection now falls back to local YOLO model using
working video files on disk instead of requiring Modal GPU. Also
fixes cache endpoint returning empty when Modal is disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Fix local player detection: use working video from disk, not R2

The export-time detection path tried to import get_r2_client from
the wrong module, crashing detection when Modal was disabled. Now
uses local working video file directly when available, falling back
to R2 download only when the file isn't on disk.

Also fixes detection cache endpoint returning empty when Modal disabled.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add diagnostic logging for player detection pipeline

Frontend: log cache check URL, response details, and enabled state
in usePlayerDetection hook.

Backend: log detection result details per-timestamp, full exception
tracebacks, video file existence checks, and per-region detection
summaries in the framing export path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Mark T260 as DONE

commit.message:
fix(inventory): remove Math.max(0,...) clamping on stock_after ledger values

The chk_ledger_stock_consistency constraint requires stock_before + delta_qty = stock_after.
Math.max(0, stock_before + delta) breaks this when stock goes negative (e.g. selling
from 0 stock gives stock_after=0 but constraint expects -1). Removed from 4 files:
inventoryLedgerService, inventoryService, pos/inventory, pos/sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

isn't shadowed. Also handle soldOut-only data from JSON-LD fallback
in the modal spots label.

commit.message:
Fix/linkedin-oauth-redirect (#87)

* fix: resolve LinkedIn OAuth redirect race condition

Register Hub listener before initial session check so the
signInWithRedirect event is not missed. When an OAuth authorization
code is present in the URL, defer the session check to let Amplify
exchange the code first, with a 3-second fallback timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: enhance internal job detail page with improved layout and error handling

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(db): use Save-Module instead of Install-Module for non-admin machines

Install-Module goes through Install-Package which requires admin rights
on locked-down Windows machines even with -Scope CurrentUser. Replaced
with Save-Module which downloads module files to ~/.psmodules/ without
any elevated operations. Scripts prepend this directory to PSModulePath
so Import-Module can find the saved module.

Start immediately with broad fallback zones (8%/92%), then re-read
the logo's true getBoundingClientRect 1.7s after load (past the
0.25s delay + 1.2s heroTitleIn animation). Adds 100px right-side
padding to account for calligraphic Fest script overflow.

commit.message:
Fix connectivity matrix sticky column and hover stacking bugs

Overlap fix: Tighten corner-cell selector from thead th:first-child
(which matched the first th in every thead row, including the Roanoke
destination header) to thead tr.conn-group-header th:first-child so
only the true corner cell gets position:sticky left:0.

Hover pop-over fix: Replace filter:brightness(0.88) on .conn-cell:hover
with a ::after pseudo-element overlay (rgba dark tint). filter:brightness()
creates a new CSS stacking context on the hovered cell, bypassing z-index
and letting it render above the sticky column. The ::after approach
produces the same darkening without affecting stacking order.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Unify spot workflows: replace thumbs up/down with rating flow, consolidate ghost pin navigation

Major changes:
- Replace confusing thumbs up/down voting with three clear choices: "I've tried it — rate it",
  "Just browsing", and "[Category] is no longer available here"
- Ghost pins for existing spots now open SpotDetailView directly instead of SuggestedSpotSheet,
  giving the same experience as tapping a spot in the community list
- Simplify SuggestedSpotSheet (~200 lines removed) — now exclusively for new venues
- Add auto-verify helper to VerificationService, consolidate 3 inline verification calls
- Add rating flow after confirm-visit on imported spots
- Add closure report button to SpotDetailView
- Add FlezcalPickerView for unified category selection
- Redesign RatingFlowView with two-step pick-then-confirm flow
- Update ProfileView verification history (ratings/unavailable instead of thumbs)
- Rename LeaderboardView scoring badge from "Verify" to "Confirm"
- Add custom picks admin panel and expanded UserPicksService
- Remove deprecated AddSpotView and StarRatingView

commit.message:
Exclude manual ledger reconciliation entries from Flex comparison (#1190)

Entries with reason containing 'Ledger reconciliation' are synthetic
bookkeeping entries (no real IBKR execution) — same concept as existing
PHANTOM_RECONCILIATION exclusion. Without this, they appear as
superfluous every reconciliation cycle.

Fix crash when loading D extension after max_coll_params increase

Added volterra_max_coll_params() to the D library so Python can query
the row width for volterra_get_supported_settings() at runtime, rather
than relying on the hardcoded ncols=4 which was stale after the
max_coll_params 3→6 change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ptree: Merge shared ancestor paths when displaying multiple target PIDs (#111)

When multiple target PIDs share common ancestors, merge their ancestry
chains into a single tree instead of printing redundant separate trees.
This builds a pruned children map from ancestor chains and renders a
unified output where ancestor-only nodes show pruned branches and target
PIDs expand their full subtrees.

commit.message:
Add Download Approved Models feature to data browser

Right-clicking the results folder now shows "⬇ Download Approved Models".
This fetches approved models from the companion nnunet_dashboard server,
presents them as a checklist, then downloads and installs selected models
via nnUNetv2_install_pretrained_model_from_zip with real-time per-model
progress tracking (pending → downloading → installing → done/failed).

Backend:
- GET /approved_models — fetch & enrich models with dataset names
- POST /download_models — start background download/install task
- GET /download_status/{task_id} — poll per-model progress

Frontend:
- Checklist dialog with dataset name, approver, and date
- Progress view with stage badges and download progress bars

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  integration 30s→15s, smoke 45s→15s

fix(task-372): 战术驾驶舱 $symbol 变量三重缺陷修复

- R1: query 锚点 hmm_realtime_choppy_score → mt5_tick_bid
- R2: refresh=2(On Time Range Change) → 初次加载不刷新变量
- R3: includeAll=true + current=$__all → Row Repeater 无法枚举

修复: docs/grafana/tactical_cockpit_v2.json
- query/definition: label_values(mt5_tick_bid, symbol)
- refresh: 2 → 1 (On Dashboard Load)
- includeAll: false + current: BTCUSD.s

CC: v16.14.0 | MASTER_ARCHIVE: v2.97.0 Section12.61
